calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Ellen Ujcic (Executor).
Mark Wilson for Vanguard Properties and Kilby Stenkamp (Objectors).
Judith Baer former Attorney for Executor.

Ms. Ng stated that there is no agreement on allocation of the statutory fees. The Court stated that it is prepared to award fees for the attorneys 50/50. Ms. Baer stated that she feels 50/50 isn't fair and that she is requesting 75%. The Court stated that it will not award extraordinary fees for preparation of the petition for special administration. Ms. Baer stated that she thought the issue of extraordinary fees was addressed at the last hearing, that the bulk of her time was preparing for the will contest and that she did not get any notes for today's hearing. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (statutory fees and extraordinary fees) is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Continued To Feb-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Ellen Ujcic (Executor).
Mark Wilson for and with Kilby Stenkamp and for Vanguard Properties (Objectors).
Judith Baer Former Counsel for Executor also present.

Mr. Wilson stated that the parties have reached a settlement, that they are in the process of finalizing the settlement and that they then will be ready to withdraw their objections. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to February 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Jan-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Ellen Ujcic (Executor).
Judith Baer (Former Counsel) in Propria Persona.
Kilby Stenkamp of Vanguard also present.

Ms. Stenkamp stated that she would like to submit a claim, and that she sent a letter to the Attorney and that she got no response. Ms. Ng stated that she was not aware of a claim and that she has not received anything. Ms. Baer stated that she referred to the letter in her declaration that was filed a week ago, that the Executor entered into an agreement with Ms. Stenkamp, and that after she substituted out, the Executor used her new Attorney to sell the property with another Broker. The Court stated that something needs to be filed for Ms. Ng to respond. Ms. Ng stated that it was her understanding that the listing agreement would have expired prior to the parties selling. Ms. Stenkamp stated that her claim is for 5% of the million dollar sale. The Court questions how much money is in the estate to be distributed. Ms. Ng stated that a little over $100,000.00 goes to the remainder beneficiaries and that the total distribution amount is $2,207,000.00. The Court stated that until this gets resolved, they can not do final distribution. Ms. Ng stated that a $25,000.00 distribution to each of the charities was done without Court approval to avoid interest. Ms. Baer stated that her extraordinary fee request is for 7.7 hours, not 9.6, that the 1.5 hours for the continued hearing was because the matter had been pregranted, that then a will contest was filed, that she was advised by the Attorney that he was going to appear at the continued hearing, and that it turned out that he did not appear, but she still had to come in. Ms. Stenkamp stated that she will ask her Attorney to file something. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to January 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of a claim.
Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for petitioner Ellen Ujcic; Patrick Ciocca for objector Colleen Boulais.

Mr. Ciocca confirmed that he had filed an objection, but not a petition to contest the will. He apologized for his nonappearance at the previous hearing, which he acknowledged was due to his own mistake in calendaring the matter. He stated that his client is now willing to withdraw the objection, and requested that the objection be deemed withdrawn. Ms. Baer stated that the order had been pregranted prior to the raising of an objection by Ms. Boulais, and requested that the Court grant the order in the form previously submitted. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Continued To Aug-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Baer for Ellen Ujcic (Petitioner).

Ms. Baer stated that this was a pre-granted matter two weeks ago, that a will contest was filed the day before the hearing, that she does not know where the contestant and the Attorney are, and requested that her petition be granted. Ms. Baer also stated that she does not believe the will contest has been served, that she has not heard from the Attorney and that she will be filing a petition for special letters. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Patrick Ciocca to appear on August 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is also continued to that date. Ms. Baer's petition for special letters is to have the same hearing date of August 9, 2017.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
